sizing_rule.note: Recalculate position size based on current equity after constant dollar withdrawal to prevent withdrawing larger percentages during drawdowns. Rebalance account after each withdrawal cycle to reset position sizing at the new equity level. Specific risk percentage and optimal f not provided by author.

source_rule_text: When withdrawing constant dollar amounts for living expenses, reallocate and reset the account to prevent withdrawing larger percentages during lower equity levels, allowing trading outcomes to dictate position adjustments at different equity levels.
